name: Hicortex — Long-term Memory That Learns
description: Your agents remember past decisions, avoid repeated mistakes, and get smarter every day. Nightly reflection generates actionable lessons that automatically update agent behavior.

licenseKey.description: Hicortex license key (hctx-...). Leave empty for free tier (100 memory cap).

llmBaseUrl.description: LLM API base URL. Auto-detected from OpenClaw config or env vars if omitted.

llmApiKey.description: LLM API key. Auto-detected from OpenClaw config or env vars if omitted.

llmModel.description: Model for importance scoring and distillation (local recommended)

consolidateHour.description: Hour (0-23, local time) to run nightly consolidation

dbPath.description: Custom path for the SQLite database file
